features.name: memory with struct-typed elements and unused fields
features.description: Code should include a memory array with struct-type elements where some fields are unused and should be eliminated by DCE

features.name: combinational memory read with field selection
features.description: Code should include a combinational memory read operation where only a specific field of the accessed element is used

features.name: conditional memory write with struct data
features.description: Code should include a conditional memory write operation where write data is a struct and only some fields are relevant
